exp.label: 02 — EXPERIENCE
exp.xiaomi.name: Xiaomi Technology
exp.xiaomi.desc: Led RustUI rendering engine development, replacing Flutter UI layer. 40%+ memory reduction, ~20% cold-start improvement, 70%+ first-frame speedup. Pioneered Agent-driven code migration workflow — 10 person-months in 2 days, rolled out across a 100-person team.
exp.alibaba.name: Alibaba · Banma Zhixing
exp.alibaba.desc: Core developer of AliOS DDS communication middleware. Achieved ~50μs end-to-end latency using Zero-Copy, shared memory, and AF_XDP user-space networking. Led Discovery module optimization: large-scale from 3-5s to 300ms. Fixed 300+ issues.
exp.dahua.name: Dahua Technology
exp.dahua.desc: Redesigned message handling with priority queues, ensuring critical alerts delivered in <200ms. Designed floating-ball notification center, praised by clients.
exp.ucsc.name: UC Santa Cruz
exp.ucsc.desc: Completed 4-year curriculum in 3 years. Scholarship every year, graduated with honors (GPA 3.58).
proj.label: 03 — PROJECTS
proj.rustui.title: RustUI Rendering Engine
proj.rustui.desc: Built a system-level rendering framework with Rust + unsafe FFI, replacing Flutter UI and integrating into HyperOS. Implemented cross-process zero-copy pipeline via mmap shared memory, deeply embedded Rust async runtime into Flutter Engine's event loop. 40%+ memory reduction, ~20% cold-start improvement, 70%+ first-frame speedup, ~30% CPU savings.
proj.dds.title: AliOS DDS Middleware
proj.dds.desc: Core developer of automotive real-time middleware. Built zero-copy shared memory channels via POSIX shm/mmap, constructed user-space networking stack with AF_XDP + eBPF bypassing kernel. Discovery optimization: large-scale from 3-5s to 300ms.
proj.ha.title: DDS Domain Redundancy HA
proj.ha.desc: Designed DDS domain redundancy architecture with seamless primary-backup failover. System availability improved from 99.9% to 99.99%, enabling real-time fault tolerance for critical automotive links.
proj.agent.title: Agent Code Migration
proj.agent.desc: Built agentic coding workflow for human-AI collaboration. Completed 10 person-months of migration in 2 days. Rolled out across a 100-person engineering team.
proj.cicd.title: CI/CD & Monitoring Platform
proj.cicd.desc: Built Jenkins CI/CD platform with Grafana dashboards for one-click builds, automated testing, and performance regression. Discovered and fixed 300+ issues (deadlocks, memory leaks, race conditions).
proj.tool.title: DDS Config Tool
proj.tool.desc: Built a visual DDS configuration tool with Vue + Electron, simplifying QoS policy and network parameter setup, improving delivery efficiency and commercial competitiveness.
contact.label: 04 — CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Let's create something amazing together
